# discord_application_command (Data Source)

Fetches a single application (slash) command by id. With `guild_id` set the guild-scoped command is read; otherwise the global command is read.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_application_command" "ping" {
  application_id = "123456789012345678"
  guild_id       = "234567890123456789"
  command_id     = "345678901234567890"
}

output "ping_command_name" {
  value = data.discord_application_command.ping.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the application that owns the command.
- `command_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the command.

### Optional

- `guild_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild for a guild-scoped command. Leave null for a global command.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Command description.
- `name` (String) Command name.
- `type` (Number) Command type.
